title: Potentially Unauthorized Gmail Route / Message Security Rule Change
Google Workspace Admin Role Assigned to a User
Domain Added to Google Workspace Trusted Domains
Google Workspace Drive Encryption Key(s) Accessed from Anonymous User
expression: event.dataset == 'google_workspace.drive' && contains(['copy','view','download'], to_string(event.action)) && google_workspace.drive.visibility == 'people_with_link' && source.user.email == '' && contains(['token','assig','pssc','keystore','pub','pgp.asc','ps1xml','pem','gpg.sig','der','key','p7r','p12','asc','jks','p7b','signature','gpg','pgp.sig','sst','pgp','gpgz','pfx','crt','p8','sig','pkcs7','jceks','pkcs8','psc1','p7c','csr','cer','spc','ps2xml'], to_string(file.extension))
